name: Verify Identity (Remote, FA view)
description: SYNTHETIC. Branch-only, FA-facing. The customer must complete ID-V on their own device, not the FA's — this screen sends them a link (SMS or email) and polls the server for completion. Replaces identity-intro + identity-verification for branch.
notes: See docs/rules/remote-identity-verification.md. The customer's own-device side of this flow (client/src/pages/RemoteIdentityEntry.jsx) is intentionally not a tracked journey step — it's a separate device/session reached via /remote-identity/:token.
